feature_bullets: Strong Wind & Quiet Design for Battery Powered Fans: This portable fan comes with 4 adjustable wind speeds to meet different needs and keep you cool at home or for travel like camping. The brushless motor and upgraded fan blades operate efficiently with minimum noise, and you will have a calm and peaceful experience thanks to its noise level of ≤ 30Db

Super Sturdy Rechargeable Battery: This portable fan rechargeable with an internal high-capacity battery takes only 3-5 hours to be full charged by using the Type-C cable, work time from 10 to 30 hours in different modes, ensuring a cool sleep at night. With the USB-A port, this battery operated fan can be used as an emergency power source for the GPS or phone charging, allowing you to avoid the anxiety of power drawn of the phone during outdoor trips

High bright Light Camping Lantern: The portable battery operated fan for travel features 3 levels of bright LED lights, provides a soft and non-glaring light. The lowest brightness is suitable for reading at night to protect your eyesight, and the highest brightness can illuminate the entire tent to enhance your nighttime experience, which make this portable fan for travel to be a great choice for camping essentials for tent camper and other outdoor activities at night

Portable Fan fit for Backpack Size: The overall size of the portable fan is small enough to easily fit into your backpack for easy carrying and storage, without extra burden. The rotatable and foldable hook design of the portable fan at the bottom make it easy to hang on your tent, tree branches or simply placed on desks at home or in the office

Multi-functional Design: The air outlet angle of the camping fan can be manually rotated by 270°, which allows you to get quiet and strong airflow from different directions, keeping the tent cool and ventilated. Just easily pouring the aromatherapy oil into the aromatherapy cotton pad, the upgraded aromatherapy function will make your sleep more restful and peaceful

local.title: Perfect for Camping, Travel, and Power Outages
local.text: This little fan is a game-changer! I bought it for camping trips, but now I use it all the time—at home, in the garage, and even during power outages. The rechargeable battery lasts a long time, and the fan puts out a surprising amount of airflow for its size.The built-in LED lantern is super bright and really handy at night. I love that it’s cordless and lightweight, so I can move it around easily or hang it inside a tent. It’s also quiet enough to use while sleeping, which is a big plus.If you’re looking for a compact, reliable, and multi-functional fan, this one is totally worth it. Great value and very well made!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on September 24, 2025

local.title: So far, so good!
local.text: I ordered 2 and they worked right out the box (not full battery but full enough). It gave me the opportunity to test them as soon as I got them. I bought them for use at an art show, but I also don't have air conditioning in my house so when testing them I was able to feel how powerful they are. At 50% the breeze copped out at around 2 feet. Up close the fan blows decent cool air and the light is decently bright (I'll have to recheck that statement when it's dark out for comparison). Indicator lights at the base tell you how full the battery is, and the fan also adjusts speeds and light brightness as the indicators change and the battery percentage goes down. I think that's super useful to be able to properly gauge the charge you have versus just guessing. It feels like its built out of pretty sturdy material and does not look cheaply made at all. The size of the fan area (top part only not base) is about the size of 2 iphones side by side. I got the blue ones and they're the same color as they are in the listing. Perfect desktop fan, and small enough for me to hide behind my display shelves during art markets. I'll try to update my review once I'm actually able to use them at full charge at my next art show.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 13, 2025

local.title: A fan for an RV to keep things Cool and Work GREAT
local.text: Very nice, noise level is Quite, puts out the air, power last long, very easy to use and seems very durable in construction. Charge time was about 3.5 hours, run time 5 hours (we turned off and still had lots of charge left) not heavy, has a handle to carry, or a hook on bottom to hang from somewhere you need to. Compared to many others and this is a Value at this price and a best buy. I recommend this product. I bought it for an drivable RV to keep the living area cool while driving, and while sleeping at night. One fan moves the air of a 23 foot Rv nicely. Love - love - love these they work GREAT!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 14, 2025

local.title: Great for Camping!
local.text: Good little fan, bought for camping. Used it over night hiking/camping. Made a big difference in sleeping well on a hot night. Battery capacity was great, used it all night on the third speed level and it ran all night and had battery to spare for the next day. Quite light weight and not too loud. Plastic felt a little flimsy but it held up. Hook worked well in our tent. Only complaint: push buttons are too easy to accidentally activate, would be better (in my opinion) if the buttons were tucked underneath or if the fan used a slider switch.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 10, 2025

local.title: I highly recommend this fan!
local.text: excellent fan...quiet and powerful on battery power and lasted most of the night until our power came back on. A real life saver!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 4, 2026

local.title: Compact, Powerful, and Handy!
local.text: This little fan packs a punch! It’s surprisingly compact — easily fits in my beach bag — but delivers strong airflow, especially on high. I love that it’s rechargeable, has an LED light, and can charge your phone in a pinch. That said, if you’re running it on high and charging a device at the same time, the battery drains faster than I’d hoped. You only get a short window of use before it needs recharging. It’s not a dealbreaker, but it’s something to be aware of. Pros:• Super compact and easy to travel with• Strong airflow for the size• Charges via USB-C and doubles as a power bank• LED light is a great bonus Cons:• Battery life drops fast on high when also charging a phone Despite that one drawback, I’d definitely buy this again. It’s perfect for beach days, camping, or emergency use — and the portability is a huge win.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on June 8, 2025
